name: White Chocolate Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups pecans (or walnuts or macadamia nuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese in a large mixing bowl at medium speed with an electric mixer until well blended.
2. Gradually add the powdered sugar and vanilla extract, continuing to mix until smooth.
3. Add the melted white chocolate and stir until combined.
4. Stir in the chopped pecans (or walnuts or macadamia nuts).
5. Spread the mixture into a greased 8-inch square pan.
6. Chill for several hours until firm.
